name: Agent System
summary: Backend and frontend system for managing AI agent sessions. Handles agent creation/destruction, real-time message streaming via SSE, pluggable agent adapters (Claude Code SDK), and slash command discovery from built-in, plugin, and project sources.
goals: Manage the full lifecycle of AI agent sessions from creation to teardown
Stream agent messages and tool events to the frontend in real time
Support pluggable agent backends through an adapter interface
Discover and execute slash commands from multiple sources

design.overview: Adapter pattern: AgentAdapter interface with ClaudeCodeAdapter implementation. AgentService orchestrates session management, SSE client management, and message persistence. Frontend agentStore consumes SSE events and manages panel state.
design.flow: Create agent → Adapter creates SDK session → User sends message → AgentService streams via SSE → agentStore updates → UI re-renders → Question/answer cycle if needed → Agent completes or errors

acceptanceCriteria.when: user creates a new agent with a prompt
acceptanceCriteria.then: an agent session is created and begins streaming responses

acceptanceCriteria.given: An agent is streaming a response
acceptanceCriteria.then: all messages are persisted and the agent status updates to completed

unit-test.when: a message is sent to the agent
unit-test.then: the message is forwarded to the adapter and response is streamed

end-to-end.given: Server is running and a project exists
end-to-end.when: user creates an agent and sends a message
end-to-end.then: the agent responds with streamed content and the session is persisted

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
